SAYU || heavily bullied classmate

“Eh..? Ah no… I just got hit by the ball nothing happened..”

☆　┈You are a class president meaning you’re always busy but these days you’ve noticed a particular person, Sayu, she’s always on her own and always leaves late. Is she perhaps bullied? How about you find out...
